feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IBP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration
entry.content:
I'm currently setting up the integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would like to confirm if my understanding is correct. I’d also appreciate links to relevant setup guides for each configuration step.

 My Understanding:

The integration requires three main configurations:

① Communication Settings on the S/4HANA Cloud side
I believe the following 4 communication scenarios are required:

SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - OData Integration (SAP_COM_0531)

Product Integration (SAP_COM_0009)

Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Integration (SAP_COM_0008)

Production Planning Integration (SAP_COM_0104)

Could you please confirm this is correct, and share setup documentation or Help Portal links for each scenario?

② Communication Settings on the IBP side
I understand that SAP_COM_0931 is the scenario used on the IBP side to receive data.
I would appreciate a guide on how to configure this: communication system, communication arrangement, receiving services, etc.

③ Configuration on Integration Suite (BTP)
Before deploying iFlows, I assume that we need to:

Enable services on Integration Suite

Configure connection parameters, such as communication system names and authentication credentials

Could you share specific instructions and documentation for this part?

My Current Setup Status:

Reviewed the Integration Flow package "SAP IBP – Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in BTP

Created communication arrangement SAP_COM_0009 on the S/4HANA Cloud side (see attached screenshot)

No communication configuration on the IBP side yet

Reference Materials I’m Using:

SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Communication Management | SAP Help Portal

Setting Up the Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Please kindly let me know if my assumptions are correct and provide any official setup guides for the scenarios listed above.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud - Controlling - Maintain Plan Version
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a client requirement on an implementation project in public cloud. The client wants to maintain "cost plannning", with multiple planning versions.

In S4HANA on premise was possible to maintain multiple planning CO versions.

However, we haven't identified this functionality in the S/4HANA Public Cloud version 2502.

Is this feature available in S/4 Public Cloud? If not, is it in the road map?

Best regards,
Francisco Costa

entry.title: App Material Documents Overview - Ho can I indicate connected attachements in the result list?
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have following use case: Users often attach files to material documents during material movement, e.g. a delivery note from the supplier for goods receipt. To day one must open each material document, to see an attachment exists.

Does anyone know how to indicate in the material documents result list an attachment exists to a material document? Presently there is no such element available in the columns. 

This use case may also apply to other documents or objects using GOS attachments or document info records. I am looking forward to any idea.

Thank you.

Regards,

Dirk

entry.title: Is there an API for creating product master data with the Generic Article type in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
In the Product Master Fiori app, there are multiple product category types available for creation, such as Product, Single Article, and Generic Article. I want to create a product with the Generic Article type via API, but I couldn't find any API that supports creating product master data specifically for Generic Articles.

Could you please help me identify the correct API that supports the creation of Generic Article types in SAP S/4HANA ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage processing rules - mass creation of rules
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

Is there a way to create in mass processing rule for bank statement ?

I know it's possible to export existing rules from one system and import them into a new system, but here I'm looking to create new rules in mass (similar to an LSMW method).

Best regards,

Constant

entry.title: Need the ability to place released sales order back on credit hold in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Our client requires the ability to place a sales order that has been released through Documented Credit Decisions back on credit hold in public cloud.  They were able to do this in ECC on prem using VKM3 and reassigning the order back to credit hold.  Upon investigation it appears this functionality is not available in Public Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Limit Item not show time period in PO
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

I am currently working with limit items in S/4HANA Public Cloud, which have replaced framework orders from ECC 6.0. In ECC, we were able to maintain a validity period (start and end dates) at the PO header level when converting a framework-type purchase requisition to a PO. This functionality allowed us to monitor timelines and extract the validity period into the PO output form.

Howevr, in the Public Cloud version, while the limit amount is shown at the item level, the validity dates are no longer displayed at the header level.

Since I need to define a timeline to monitor framework-type POs and also reflect this information in the PO form output, could you please help verify where this data can be maintained or if there is an alternative approach in the Public Cloud?

Thank you for your support.

 

Best regards,
Keratiya D.

entry.title: EDI in S4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi All

IDOCs were used for EDI mapping and communication with Business Partners in S4HANA Private Cloud and older versions of SAP ERP. 

What is the recommended way to map EDIs for S4HANA Public Cloud? Are IDOCs available or can we use APIs for the mapping?

Regards

Lakshmi

entry.title: How to filter and analyze based on Ship-To Party’s City/District in the List Sales Orders report?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We need to capture the City/District of the Ship-To Party for each line item in the Sales Order, as per the selected address in the Item Partner Tab. For reporting purposes, this information is crucial for us. Once this custom field is populated, we intend to use it in the "List Sales Orders" report, enabling filtering and analysis based on the Ship-To Party’s City/District.

We've been suggested with I_SalesOrderPartner, I_SalesOrderItemPartner, and I_Address_2. However, they appear to be not feasible in our case.

Any other suggestions?

Thank you.

entry.title: 報價引用其他物料的標準成本估算結果
entry.content:
HI SAP

想請問PE是否支援在報價或是銷售訂單中透過虛擬料號引用其他物料標準估算的結果，並在報價或是銷售訂單上調整估算的成本結構?

entry.title: 记账码字段状态可以更改吗，如何更改
entry.content:
1、记账码字段状态可以更改吗，如何更改

2、手工录入会计凭证，想输入作业类型字段，在字段状态组已经允许输入了，但是在输入界面没有这个字段

entry.title: How to field maintain HSN/SAC field in S/4HANA Cloud for country India
entry.content:
Unable to locate HSN/SAC codes for India, how is this maintained?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: API For Advanced Credit Management
entry.content:
I need your help for the API to communicate the data from a private agency regarding credit management to communicate the data from the agency system to SAP (Scoring....).

I need your feedback asap please regarding which API to be used as this is important to AGFA.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: While printing a Form LOGO is missing for the new company code in sap public cloud 2 system landscap
entry.content:
Dear Experts
I hope you’re doing well. I’m facing an issue in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud with a 2-system landscape (Quality and Production systems) and need your expertise to resolve it.

Issue Description:

I have created a new company code in the system. When I try to print a form (e.g., Purchase Order, Invoice, etc.) for this company code, the logo is not appearing in the output. The logo displays correctly for other existing company codes.
Thank you in advance.


Regards,

sanjay

entry.title: A warning regarding group ledger scenarios is displayed when completing scope
entry.content:
Customer believes the group ledger scenarios related popup is an error and they'd like further info.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Mass Update Credit Limit Issue
entry.content:
We are encountering an issue while trying to perform a Customer- Extend existing record by credit management data using the migration template and RunID #2 in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud DIGITS.

We haven't activated the Scope item 1QM (Advanced Credit Management). Thus, what are alternative options or workaround for the mass update credit limt.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Profit center is not being derived from 1st line item in SAP S4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
While posting the entries, if the user is entering the profit center in 1st line item, then the system should derive the profit center in 2nd line item automatically, because document splitting is active here.


But the system is not deriving the profit center in 2nd line item automatically.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Query for Reconciled and Unreconciled transactions for a Bank GL
entry.content:
How can I achieve to retrieve all the reconciled and unreconciled transactions for a specific bank GL for a specific Posting Date range in SAP public cloud. request you to suggest any report or CDS view for the same.


Kind Regards,


Mahima


contact: PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EPC-992 - WBS on consignment stock - Public cloud
entry.content:
We have a business case for assigning consignment stock to a WBS element in our public cloud solution.  We see from the following KBA’s that this is a solution that SAP has provided a solution for, but this does not seem to be available for Public Cloud. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003332652
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003033182

 

and these 2 which are for public cloud, but do not completely fit the issue

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003515778
https://me.sap.com/notes/0003476355 

 

 

The reasons for this requirement are:

Allowing WBS assignment directly in the Consignment Issue sales order would:
• Eliminate manual ledger adjustments
• Provide real-time profitability tracking at the production line level
• Improve reporting accuracy and efficiency
• Fulfill contractual obligations with customers regarding cost
transparency per production line

entry.title: Create product using OData v2
entry.content:
Hi,

Sorry, but I'm new to BTP and the Integration Suite. I'm just trying to create a Product in S/4HANA Public Edition.

When using Postman, I can create a Product using the followig payload to the endpoint https://myNNNNNN-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCT_SRV/A_Product:

{
    "Product": "EDWARD01",
    "ProductType": "FERT",
    "BaseUnit": "EA",
    "to_Description": [
        {
            "Product": "EDWARD01",
            "Language": "EN",
            "ProductDescription": "Edward Test 1"
        }
    ]
}

In Integration Studio, having this part:

Defined my adapter:



In my mapping:

Tried several different mapping structures. The one closed to hopefully the correct one, will be the one listed above. However, still get the error: 

I've also tried to use the downloaded edmx and then map to A_Product and A_ProductType without any success.

Can someone please point me to the correct mapping structure to be used when creating a Product?

Thanks in advance.
